title: Evidence
description: An evidence item linking a company's data to a tender requirement

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence item

requirement_id.description: The requirement this evidence relates to

description.description: Description of what this evidence proves

value.description: Numeric value if applicable (e.g., turnover amount, project value)

verified.description: Whether this evidence has been verified (e.g., CA-certified, stamped)

source_document.description: Filename or path to the source document, if available

gap.description: True if this is a gap (evidence is required but not available or not documented)

gap_description.description: If gap=true, describes what is missing and why it matters
